name: pixi
description: Installs the pixi package manager (https://pixi.sh) as a system-wide binary.

version.description: Version of pixi to install. Use 'latest' or a semver such as '0.68.0' (a leading 'v' is optional).

bioconda.description: Configure the Bioconda channel by writing a system-wide pixi config at /etc/pixi/config.toml with default-channels = ["conda-forge", "bioconda"].
